_doc: Vendored offline-only JS bundles inlined by dashboard_v2. Filenames here drive the loader in src/research_os/tools/actions/synthesis/dashboard_v2.py — keep in sync.
loader: dashboard_v2 inlines bundles conditionally: minisearch + vega/vega-lite/vega-embed always; plotly only when a *.plotly.json sidecar exists; mermaid only when a *.mermaid file exists; vis-network only when a *.graphml file exists.
